task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/subsurface_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Load the base HALE UAV model in OpenVSP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP workspace showing the loaded aircraft model, with the title or file path indicating 'hale_uav.vsp3'.

task_completion.description: Add and configure the Solar_Array_Inboard and Solar_Array_Outboard subsurfaces on the Wing component.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP Geometry window for the 'Wing' component with the 'Sub' tab open. It should show two subsurfaces of type 'Rectangle' named 'Solar_Array_Inboard' and 'Solar_Array_Outboard', with U and W start/end parameters matching the privileged information.

task_completion.description: Add and configure the Morphing_Hinge subsurface on the Horiz_Tail component.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP Geometry window for the 'Horiz_Tail' component with the 'Sub' tab open. It should show a subsurface of type 'Line' named 'Morphing_Hinge', with U and W start/end parameters matching the privileged information.

task_completion.description: Save the modified model as hale_uav_subsurfaces.vsp3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog or a file manager/terminal showing the creation of 'hale_uav_subsurfaces.vsp3' in /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/.

task_completion.description: Run the Degen Geom analysis and export the CSV.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 'Degen Geom' analysis dialog being executed, or a file manager/terminal showing 'hale_uav_degengeom.csv' created in /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenVSP GUI to modify the model and run the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenVSP application open, with the agent interacting with the Geometry windows, Sub tabs, and Analysis menus, rather than just running a background script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually entered or configured the subsurface parameters in the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The U and W parameter fields in the OpenVSP 'Sub' tab should be visibly modified by the agent, corresponding to the values in the spec file.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV and VSP3 files were generated by OpenVSP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use the 'File > Save As' and 'Analysis > Degen Geom' menus in OpenVSP to generate the outputs, rather than creating dummy files via terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct subsurface parameters are: 1) Solar_Array_Inboard: U_Start=0.55, U_End=0.85, W_Start=0.05, W_End=0.45. 2) Solar_Array_Outboard: U_Start=0.55, U_End=0.85, W_Start=0.55, W_End=0.95. 3) Morphing_Hinge: U_Start=0.75, U_End=0.75, W_Start=0.1, W_End=0.9. The modified model must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/hale_uav_subsurfaces.vsp3 and the Degen Geom CSV exported to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/hale_uav_degengeom.csv.
